ext.description: Run project file-quality checks from a VS Code sidebar. Scaffold default ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript, and JSON checks into .vibecode/file-lint, then run one or all checks with output captured in the extension channel.
view.container.title: File Lint
view.checks.name: Checks
config.checksRoot: Workspace-relative folder that stores file lint check definitions. Default: .vibecode/file-lint.
